config.projectminimaphud.title: Project Minimap Hud Config
config.projectminimaphud.enable_xaeromin: Displays the current EMC in the Xaero's Minimap information display
This option has the highest priority.
config.projectminimaphud.xaerominimap_em: Short: Numbers with units like M; Full: Displays the complete number (111,111,111).
config.projectminimaphud.enable_xaeromin: Allow Shift to temporarily switch display format
Short format will display the full display style, and vice versa.
Displays the current EMC rate of change
Displays a rate of change indicator when the EMC changes.
Displays the ProjectE icon before EMC text
Add ProjectE icon to the left of the EMC display on the minimap.
